IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (18301617.pdf)
SUMMARY: Successful fifteen years of experience in IT Management and Technical Support. Skilled in installation, configuration, migration and implementation of server platforms. Dedicated IT Manager well-versed in analyzing and mitigating risk and finding cost-effective solutions.
SKILLS: Active Directory, Adobe, Antivirus, Backup Exec, Budget, business processes, call center, capacity planning, Cisco, computer assembly, Hardware, contracts, Direct Attached Storage (DAS), Database, Dell, Dell Servers, Designing, Desktops, Documentation, Firewall, HP, hiring, information systems, ISO 9000, leadership, Linux, Logistics and Management, Mac, MAC OS, Managing, Access, Microsoft Certified Professional, Microsoft Exchange, Microsoft Office Professional, Microsoft Project, Microsoft SQL Server, Microsoft Visio Professional, Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows, Network Attached Storage (NAS), Enterprise, Network Printers, Networking, new product development, Operating Systems, PBX, PCI, Phone System, policies, Project Management, quality assurance, quality improvement, QuickBooks Pro, Research, Robotic, safety, Storage Area Network (SAN), teamwork, technical analysis, Troubleshooting, upgrade, Visio Professional, vision, Web Portal, WAN

SOURCE: 18301617.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Technology Manager
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: July 2000 to Current
DESCRIPTION: Provide leadership, vision and management to the IT department. Develop Capitol Budget, monitor and approve department expenditures. Manage network infrastructure, phone system, hardware and software configuration, IT staff, PCI DSS compliance.

SOURCE: 18301617.pdf
JOB TITLE: Computer Manufacturing Supervisor
COMPANY: City
DATES: September 1998 to September 1999
DESCRIPTION: Supervised a team of computer assemblers and testers. Organized production, implemented safety procedures, managed documentation control.

SOURCE: 18301617.pdf
JOB TITLE: Quality Assurance Supervisor
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: April 1995 to March 1998
DESCRIPTION: Supervised quality inspectors and software evaluators. Hired, interviewed candidates. Coordinated new product development. Ensured hardware and software compatibility.
